summary: Joel announces the addition of bidirectional text support to CityDesk, his content management software. This technical improvement enabled the launch of Hebrew and Farsi editions of Joel on Software. The post highlights the ongoing internationalization effort, bringing the total number of language editions to 24.
key_points: CityDesk added bidirectional (RTL) text support, a non-trivial internationalization feature
Hebrew and Farsi editions of Joel on Software were launched as a result
Joel on Software reached 24 language editions, demonstrating significant global readership
money_quotes: I finally got around to adding bidirection text support to CityDesk, so today I can launch Hebrew and Farsi editions of Joel on Software, bringing the total language count up to 24.
key_insight: Proper internationalization support, including bidirectional text, is essential for reaching a truly global audience.
